name: sub-frontend-engineer
description: React/Vite frontend workflow agent with component design, state management, and build optimization

hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qiE '(\.env\.production|\.env\.prod|production\.env)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Production environment file edit blocked"}'; exit 2; fi

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(tsx|ts|css)$'; then echo "[Frontend] Source file modified: $file"; fi || true
